subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of the All-Merciful testifieth unto him who speaketh the truth that, verily, he is the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Symbol [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد لسان الرحمن لمن ینطق بالحق انه لهو الغیب المکنون و الرمز المخزون و
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
